name: YouTube Channel Stats
description: Retrieves subscriber count, total views, and video count for a YouTube channel.
requirements: Node v18+, YouTube Data API v3 key

input_schema.name: channel_handle
input_schema.label: Channel Handle
input_schema.description: The YouTube channel handle, with or without the @ prefix (e.g. @mkbhd)

input_schema.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
input_schema.label: YouTube API Key env var name
input_schema.description:
Set Up Google API Access

1. Go to the Google Cloud Console
2. Create a new project (or select an existing one)
3. Enable the YouTube Data API v3
4. Go to Credentials → Create Credentials → API Key
5. Copy your API key
